message:
fix: resolve feedback project dir via --repo-path fallback chain

Extract feedback_project_dir() helper that checks repo_path before
workspace, fixing feedback-show/accept/ignore when invoked from a
different working directory.  Add integration test to verify the
--repo-path path is honoured for --feedback-show.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
